recommendations.title: Tentacles
recommendations.genres: Horror, Romance, Science Fiction, Thriller, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: A young Los Angeles couple Tara and Sam fall head over heels into a new romance, entwining their lives—until their intimacy transforms into something terrifying.

recommendations.title: Double, Double, Toil and Trouble
recommendations.genres: Family, TV Movie, Horror, Comedy, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: On Halloween night, two precocious little girls try to save their parents from their nasty old capitalist aunt's greedy clutches. Magic abounds and they meet mysterious new friends along the way.

recommendations.title: Sightless
recommendations.overview: After an attack renders her blind, Ellen withdraws from the world to recover. But soon she plunges into paranoia, unable to convince anyone that her assailant has returned to terrorize her by hiding in plain sight.

recommendations.title: Nekromantik
recommendations.overview: A necrophilic street sweeper who cleans up after grisly accidents brings home a corpse for him and his girlfriend to enjoy sexually, but is dismayed to see that she prefers the corpse over him.

recommendations.title: Muppets Haunted Mansion
recommendations.overview: Gonzo is challenged to spend one night in The Haunted Mansion on Halloween night.

recommendations.title: The Bad Seed
recommendations.overview: A widower suspects that his seemingly perfect adolescent daughter is a heartless killer.

recommendations.title: The Jester
recommendations.overview: A malevolent being known as The Jester terrorizes the inhabitants of a small town on Halloween night, including two estranged sisters who must come together to find a way to defeat this evil entity.

recommendations.title: The Human Race
recommendations.overview: A cancer survivor, an amputee, several immigrants, and many others are snatched from a Los Angeles street and forced to take part in a deadly race.

recommendations.title: Strange Darling
recommendations.overview: Nothing is what it seems when a twisted one-night stand spirals into a serial killer’s vicious murder spree.

recommendations.title: 44 Minutes: The North Hollywood Shoot-Out
recommendations.overview: After a failed bank robbery, two heavily armed men hold the Los Angeles Police Department at bay for 44 minutes.
